description_long: This sheep has a robust, rounded body covered in a smooth, uniform white wool coat, with no visible curls or patches. Its head is angular and dark gray, contrasting sharply with the lighter body, and features a flat, elongated snout. The ears are short, triangular, and stick out slightly to the sides, giving the animal a somewhat alert appearance. The legs are slender, straight, and black, supporting the body in a standing posture. The tail is short and points downward, blending into the rear of the body. There are no visible horns, and the overall form is stylized with clean, geometric lines.
description: A stylized sheep with a rounded white wool body, dark angular face, short triangular ears, and slender black legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sheep's broad chest, angular dark face, and both triangular ears protruding to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sheep's elongated body, sloped back, and the straight alignment of its legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded back, short downward-pointing tail, and the symmetry of the hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same body proportions, facial profile, and leg posture.
attribute_wool_pattern: The wool appears smooth and uniform, with no visible curls, waves, or patchiness. The color is consistently white across the body, with no distinct markings or variations.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are short, triangular, and stick out laterally from the head. They appear upright and slightly pointed, with no drooping or rounding.
attribute_tail_position: The tail is short, positioned downward, and closely follows the contour of the rear, making it only slightly visible from the back.
attribute_leg_posture: The legs are straight and positioned to support the sheep in a standing pose. All four legs are evenly spaced and appear to be bearing weight, indicating a stable, stationary stance.
